description_long: This is a modern, dark blue military-style jet airplane with a sleek, angular design and a prominent forward canopy. The wings are sharply swept back and feature round insignia markings with the number '60' on each side. The fuselage is streamlined, with twin vertical stabilizers at the rear and a compact, aerodynamic body. The cockpit canopy is tinted blue and smoothly integrated into the nose section, suggesting a single-pilot configuration. The engine intakes and exhausts are located at the rear, and the landing gear is not visible, implying a retractable design. The overall appearance is that of a high-performance, stealth-inspired fighter jet.
description: A sleek, dark blue modern jet fighter with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a blue-tinted forward canopy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, blue canopy, and wide, swept-back wings with visible insignia.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the streamlined fuselage, wing insignia, and the smooth integration of the cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin vertical stabilizers, engine exhausts, and the full wingspan with insignia on both wings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular wing, insignia, and the cockpit's forward placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets and a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
